updateNote: Day 58 Late refresh — Lebanon front escalates: IDF kills 9 (Yahmar al-Shaqif 4, Safad al-Batikh 2+17 wounded, 3 Hezbollah in vehicle). Netanyahu: 'strike with force.' HMS Diamond intercepts Houthi ASBM targeting Maersk Yorktown (2nd attack). USS Pinckney intercepts M/V Sevan — 37 ships redirected. Pezeshkian rejects talks under pressure.
